summary: send-message.ts and read-messages.ts use hardcoded forward slash (instance.directory + '/.rig/messages') instead of path.join() — will produce mixed-separator paths on Windows, causing file not found errors
Binary download manager (manager.ts) lacks arm64-linux and arm64-windows platform entries for 5 of 6 auxiliary binaries — silent unsupported status on ARM Linux/Windows
readConfigFile() at config.ts:391 uses Effect.orDie — any config file read failure kills the fiber. Corrupted config file = app crash at startup

process.cwd() fallback at 11 locations throughout the codebase (file-memory.ts, project-map.ts, effect-cmd.ts, runtime.ts, etc.) silently produces wrong paths when app is run from any directory other than the project root
Flag.ts evaluates most env vars at module import time (not via get accessor) — env vars set after the module loads are ignored. Only 7 of 31 flags use get accessors for late evaluation
